steps.t: Aldstan's sword sits beside him at the refugees' cave in the High Knolls, north of Byre Tor. You should collect Aldstan's sword to bury it with his so…
Ránmald can be found in the refugees' cave in the northern High Knolls. You should ask Ránmald if there is anything she wishes to bury with her husban…
Ránmald's pendant can be found in the refugees' cave in the High Knolls. You should collect Ránmald's pendant.
Céolstan can be found between Byre Tor and the refugees' cave. You should find Céolstan, and lay him to rest.
Céolstan can be found between Byre Tor and the refugees' cave. You should lay Céolstan to rest.
Aldstan can be found in the refugees' cave in the northern High Knolls.
